description: Miami for men from playboy is inspired by the sun 'n sand in the city of Miami. Top notes are bergamot and apple with a heart of rose, jasmine and cyclamen. The base has notes of amber, musk and cedar.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
